channel.title: Open-Finance on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Open-Finance on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: Why the Yield Curve is the Pulse of Every Bank
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A deep dive into the ‘gravitational constant’ of finance: the yield curve. Former UBX CEO John Januszczak explains how interest rate spreads drive banking physics and why inversions stall the engine of innovation.

item.title: Scaling Innovation: Beyond the Theatre of "New"
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: In this deep-dive episode of FINCIRCLE, John Januszczak explores the journey of building and scaling ventures in the fintech space. He shares insights on leadership, the transition from corporate executive to venture builder, and why scaling innovation requires more than just capital—it requires a fundamental shift in mindset and architecture.

item.title: Reshaping the Future of Banking & Finance
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: The Asian Banker provides a comprehensive overview of the ’triad of disruption’ facing financial institutions today. The article details how the simultaneous maturation of Generative AI, Central Bank Digital Currencies (CBDCs), and decentralized architectures is moving beyond experimentation to become the core infrastructure of future finance.

item.title: Unlocking the Value of Open Finance
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Open Finance is really quite simple: the data financial institutions hold on their customers belongs to their customers. But for the Philippines, we require a much broader view of what needs to be open and shareable to verify credibility.

item.title: Splix
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A white-label ‘Transact-Now-Pay-Later’ platform that empowers merchants to offer branded installment plans.

item.title: The Future of Finance: All About Embedded, Open, and Decentralized Finance
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: An overview of how Embedded, Open, and Decentralized Finance are converging to reshape the global financial landscape.

item.title: xpanse
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: API-first platform that standardizes and aggregates financial services, allowing developers, banks, and fintechs to launch banking, identity, and payment products with a single integration.
